title: SMP tweaks
description: A mod that makes getting gear on SMPs easy!
body:
For those of you who arent very good at getting gear on smps this mod makes it much more easy. It will help you get a full smp kit with ease on a real smp by intoducing much more easy crafting recpies. This encorages pvp as players can quickly get gear to fight!
The mod works server side so only the owner needs to download and put into server.

Note: The origenal recipes for items like golden apples still exist so make sure to let server members know of the easy crafts (this might get changed in update later).
